title: Seed mechanic things stuff split
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 17, 2011 2:04 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: The entire theory that Kaworu betrayed Seele is in the lines that Ornette quoted, specifically: "Humans forget their foolishness and repeat their mistakes." and "We will not rely on the powers of Adam or the Angels."

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 17, 2011 2:20 am Bagheera wrote: I find it difficult to read betrayal in those lines, personally.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 17, 2011 2:32 am Bagheera wrote: We know Angels have S2 Organs. Adam might or might not have one

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 17, 2011 2:36 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: "Forget their foolishness and repeat their mistakes" = Seele made the same mistake "We will not rely on the power of Adam or the Angels" = Their mistake was related to using Adam for their own purposes. 2I was first mistake, using Kaworu to achieve their goal was the repeating of that mistake. That's the connection, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 17, 2011 2:42 am Bagheera wrote: I get that. I'm just saying it seems tenuous at best.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 17, 2011 2:46 am Reichu wrote: You need to pay more attention, son.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 17, 2011 2:59 am Bagheera wrote: And yet Lilith did her thing way back when and Adam presumably would have done his thing if some damn fool hadn't jacked his S2 Organ all the way to hell and back.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 17, 2011 3:18 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: We don't really know what Lilith's thing "was". Her Lance was lost and it seems like she simply leaked LCL from which all LDO sprung from naturally rather than through some kind of Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 17, 2011 3:40 am @Mods: this is getting into Impact mechanics and Seed, errr, nature and away from ep. 24 stuff. Can we do a split? Bagheera wrote: Wha...? Based on what? What reason do we have to think she didn't create Earth's ecosystem as planned before going dormant?

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Apr 17, 2011 3:58 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: But we also know that Adam and Lilith are fundamntally different, or else they wouldn't produce such wildly different offspring that, according to the CI, has the FoK and FoL, respectively.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 17, 2011 5:05 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: Because she lost her lance, which seems pretty important in matters of Impacts, and there's reason to doubt that she would have an S2 at all. If she had an S2, then Seele/Gendo should be able to use her without being able to manufacture their own S2, which they seemed so intent on doing.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 17, 2011 5:08 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: Getting an S2 organ, according to Ritsuko, just "woke her up".

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 17, 2011 5:14 am Reichu wrote: Ritsuko says that she's awakened when she reactivates with 400% synch, which is before she sticks her face into Zer's core.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Apr 17, 2011 5:37 am Bagheera wrote: Good point. Yui wanted the S2 Organ because it tied into her plans for Instrumentality/3I. How that relates to Gendo's or SEELE's plans, I dunno, but it clearly ties into her plans to hijack the process. Perhaps SEELE thought that, sans S2 Organ, Unit 01 would be an inert part of the process, with only

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 17, 2011 6:21 am Monk Ed wrote: Whoa whoa, wait a minute there. Seele did not plan to use Unit 01 at all until Gendo forced them to by throwing the Lancea all the way to the moon. Their original plan was to use Lilith. They state all this explicitly, early in EoE:

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Apr 17, 2011 10:45 am @Betrayal: Yes, that's where it came from, along with the assumption that they wanted Kaworu to go take Gendo out of the equation. Reading the lake conversation as encouraging haste rather than specifying a target, however, removes this from the table. @Fruits and bodies: I'm inclined to think that Seeds have both fruits but only pass one of them on to their children. It seems to me that the 'forbidden union' is really only necessary to have an impact, but seeds can apparently do that all on their own. This also explains why it doesn't matter which seed the angels are attempting to get to, either will do for their purposes as fusing with it will give them a functional double-dose of fruity goodness. I'm not quite sure why Rei or Kaworu need to rejoin a larger-scale body for that to work though. Perhaps an ATF gets magnified by the scale of the body it's attached to, perhaps using the 'potential' energy stored in keeping the body together? Sure they have ZOMG WTFBBQ awesome ATFs to begin with (though using them at that level seems to have unwanted side effects like arms falling off... though Kaworu might not care about that if he's planning to get a better body and/or die soon after anyway), but does that mean that after the upgrade they're even more epic in scope? @Seele impact recipies: Yes, apparently they planned to use Lilith originally and didn't particularly care about 01.... that was all Gendo's deal, and as long as it killed angels they didn't really give a shit if he got to keep his toy. Why they needed the lance is a good question, but since what the lance actually does is never really explained and doesn't make sense to begin with, who knows? It's just a thing that does stuff to other things as the plot directs. Maybe they just wanted it around to theoretically keep Lilith in line or something... as if it was such a successful plan when they tried it on Adam. @Lilith's angels: Bagheera, what are you smoking? There's no evidence whatsoever that Lilith created any intermediary stages of life prior to the one we see as 'normal' in the series. You're just making up new, wholly unnecessary entities in the discussion for no reason whatsoever, and it's well past time to shave this nonsense down with Occam's Razor.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 17, 2011 10:56 am NemZ wrote: Bagheera, what are you smoking?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Apr 17, 2011 11:09 am How is that an ad hominem? I've only been commenting on your semi-coherence and numerous factual errors at the start of this this discussion (prior to the split) and continued habit of just making shit up, not anything about you personally. Even if it was intended as a personal attack, which it wasn't, why would suggesting you intake recreational substances while posting qualify as such? Many of my favorite people have certainly done the same, myself included.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sun Apr 17, 2011 11:30 am To keep the discussion civilized, may I suggest we avoid using phrases that may be considered personal and not related to the topic itself? Even if many do not consider recreational drug use as an affront, there are many who would frown on that. Besides, it is not just soft drug that can be smoked, hard drug can be smoked in to..... Just some suggestion of avoiding misunderstanding -- I think it is much better than having another thread locked... We already have two locked because of intense discussions the last 2 days...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Apr 18, 2011 6:14 am Bagheera wrote: Assuming only one S2 was needed. Don't forget that Adam had an S2 just as the Angels did, presumably not without reason. The Angels can't manage Impact on their own, and Adam might or might not be able to;
